results.title: Indian bond yields edge lower as traders await RBI policy decision
results.description: The 10-year yield fell to 6.9802 percent ahead of the RBI’s rate decision, with investors watching for cues on inflation, rupee support and debt inflows.

results.title: Concern over discovery of two bodies in Lagos lagoon
results.description: The bodies in Lagos lagoon Residents have expressed concern over the discovery of two bodies in the Lagos lagoon along Awolowo Way, Lagos, raising questions about security and policing along the waterways. In the last five months, two bodies have reportedly been discovered in the lagoon. results.title: Elephant Calf Rescued from Deepor Beel After Getting Separated from Herd
results.description: A female elephant calf was rescued on Thursday from the Deepor Beel wetland on the outskirts of Guwahati after it got separated from its herd. According to reports, a herd of around 20 wild elephants entered the wetland area on Wednesday night in search of food.
